nodes.label: Phase 11 papers README (limit-map: real data + scale)
nodes.rationale: Takes the P10 instrument to harder/real data and scale; identifies seven deltas (D1-D7) the rough plan missed — canonical arena names, protocol pins, and the arena canon table.

nodes.label: 5-Datasets cross-dataset gauntlet (Ebrahimi 2020)
nodes.rationale: Canonical CL benchmark sequentially learning entirely different datasets; the project runs a 3-block variant class-IL (harder than the field's task-IL convention) as its E7 arena.

nodes.label: No-change (persistence) baseline / label autocorrelation trap
nodes.rationale: Souza et al. 2020: predict-previous-label scores ~85% on ELEC2, beating many learners; adopted as a mandatory sanity line on every real-world stream — any cell failing to beat it renders FLOOR/uninformative.

nodes.label: Gas sensor drift dataset limitations paper (Dennler 2022)
nodes.rationale: Batch/run-order artifacts in the gas-drift dataset; adopted per-batch class-composition manifest table + balanced accuracy as the honest anti-hype guard, cited preemptively before running the E2 headline arena.

nodes.label: Wild-Time Yearbook / MedMNIST arenas
nodes.rationale: Two box-feasible real-world arenas the rough plan missed: Yearbook = real 8-decade vision drift (no backbone/RGB needed); BloodMNIST = famous lightweight biomedical bonus rung; neither gates the phase.

nodes.label: Pinned openml IDs (and the wrong-variant trap)
nodes.rationale: Fashion-MNIST=40996; Electricity=151 (v1, chronological — NOT the v2 43945 'balanced' variant which destroys time order, wrong for a drift stream); Covertype=1596; naming these prevents grabbing the wrong benchmark variant at bench.
